title: Define T-Deck direct BLE native app service
description:
Define and implement/document the direct BLE native LICHEN app protocol surface for LilyGO T-Deck above the shared app-level contract. The T-Deck gateway config does not currently enable BLE NUS or a direct BLE native service; those remain blocked until the service UUIDs, characteristic semantics, framing, versioning, and app-model mapping are specified and covered by tests or golden vectors.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Direct native BLE LCI contract is documented with service UUIDs, characteristic semantics, framing, versioning, capabilities, and app-model mapping.
- Unsupported and hardware-only pieces are explicit.
- Implementation, test, client-discovery, and physical-validation follow-up Beads are filed and linked to the relevant blockers.
notes:
Input from project-LICHEN-9c4y.15: direct native LICHEN BLE should not keep generic NUS UUIDs if product images also need MeshCore-compatible BLE, because MeshCore requires exact NUS UUIDs with raw MeshCore frames while native currently uses NUS for SLIP IPv6. Native BLE service design should choose LICHEN-specific UUIDs for simultaneous coexistence.

2026-07-01 no-hardware evidence: documented the Direct Native BLE LCI Service in docs/ble-app-surface-owner.md. Contract maps the direct native BLE surface to LCI over SLIP-framed IPv6, assigns reproducible LICHEN-specific UUIDv5 service/characteristic UUIDs, defines two-octet protocol version 0x0001, four-octet capabilities bitset, 1280-octet decoded IPv6 packet limit, ATT fragmentation semantics, reset/oversize behavior, security boundary, and T-Deck enablement boundary. UUID reproduction command passed: UUIDv5(DNS, lichen.mesh) produced namespace d4b23c0e-2ffc-52b7-9ec6-b4b5baa32382 and all documented attribute UUIDs matched.

Created follow-up Beads: project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.6.2.1 native_sim/Twister service-shape and SLIP egress tests; project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.6.2.2 LICHEN-specific native BLE LCI UUID implementation while preserving legacy mutually exclusive native NUS policy; project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.6.2.3 native client discovery updates; project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.6.2.4 physical T-Deck BLE LCI validation. Physical validation is blocked on .2.1, .2.2, and project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.6.3.

Checks: git diff --check passed; bd lint project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.6.2 and children passed with no template warnings; bd doctor passed 13 checks with only the pre-existing missing pre-push hook warning.

Review: three independent review agents ran. Initial findings were UUID recipe reproducibility, capabilities width, oversize limit, physical-validation dependency, acceptance criteria, and legacy NUS migration wording. All P1/P2 findings were fixed. Final re-reviews reported no remaining P0/P1/P2 protocol/design findings; one metadata note about .beads/last-touched was addressed by this active-Bead notes update.
close_reason: Completed: direct native BLE LCI service contract documented, unsupported/hardware boundaries explicit, and implementation/test/client/physical follow-up Beads filed and linked. Evidence and review outcomes recorded in Bead notes.
